analyst_briefing: CRISIS regime VERY HIGH conviction confirmed: system_average stable at -0.686 with all 8 asset classes BEARISH/MILD NEGATIVE. Key SA structural signal is USTR's 76 Section 301 investigations — post-SCOTUS IEEPA nullification regime re-architecture targeting forced labor/excess capacity across dozens of economies, creating durable tariff baseline (effective rate 11.8% rising). Affects Metals/Tech/EM Equities/Consumer Staples directly; market mispricing BOP expiry as de-escalation. Energy SA lead (Hormuz 5-10 ships/day, Brent $104) and fiscal SA ($9.8T maturity wall) provide 3+ corroborators exceeding regime change threshold. TS noise limited to fx_swap_basis partial ceasefire normalization (episodic_flag true, volumes ATH $3.6T). Blind Spots 1-2 active: earnings suppression flags Tech Q2 guidance risk, real M2 negative hits Crypto. Tail risks: Section 301 durability (non-consensus, 0.75x0.85) and Treasury fiscal dominance (under-covered, 0.65x0.90). Cross-flags: ERM Hormuz/301 supply chains (HIGH), SCEM EM sovereign stress (MEDIUM). No US/non-US divergence; global synchronized downside.
